title: Verify the correct Trial Corner entry point widget is displayed based on the trial day
description: Tests that the UI correctly displays the persistent header widget on Day 0/1 and switches to the floating pill from Day 2 onwards for active trials.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and belongs to the target cohort.

steps.description: 1. Log in as a user on Day 1 of their trial and observe the homepage.
3. Log in as a different user on Day 3 of their trial and observe the homepage.

expected_result: The Day 1 user sees the persistent header widget. The Day 3 user sees the floating pill widget. Both widgets navigate to the Trial Corner when clicked.
